attributes.description: This dashboard shows Sandbox Verdict logs collected by the Zscaler ZIA integration.

params.markdown:
**Zscaler ZIA**

This dashboard delivers a comprehensive overview of Sandbox Verdict logs. It features key metrics highlighting total files analyzed and unique threats detected. It highlights a pie chart breakdown by verdict and a table showing file type counts broken down by verdict. Additionally, it includes a timeline chart that tracks sandbox verdict logs over time, while bar charts surface the top MITRE tactics and top MITRE techniques.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/zscaler_zia/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs Zscaler ZIA] Sandbox Verdict Logs
